_comment: Single source of truth + admin inventory for every app. Fields: name, icon, desc, repo, site (public URL, omit if not live), stack (short tech label), db (database type or null), host (where it's deployed or null), status (live|ready|needs-db|needs-rework|not-web), note (blocker / next step). The dashboard groups by status and shows the stack + db + host as chips. Add an app by appending one object.

apps.name: AnnoTag
apps.desc: Tag any web page and re-find your notes.

apps.name: Contractor Calculator
apps.desc: Compare W-2 vs. contractor take-home pay.

apps.name: emagic
apps.note: PHP contact form inert on static host.

apps.name: PEG Ratio Comparison
apps.desc: Compare whether stocks' growth justifies their P/E.

apps.name: Compass
apps.desc: Productivity app organized by Who / What / Where / When / Why / How.

apps.name: Flecks Capital
apps.note: Next.js, no DB — deploys to Vercel.

apps.name: MBA Library
apps.note: Next.js, no DB — deploys to Vercel.
apps.desc: Reference library of MBA frameworks, organized by class.

apps.name: Utah Characters
apps.note: Deploys; PHP form needs a form service.
apps.desc: Utah Characters — site with a contact form.

apps.name: Expense Manager
apps.note: Move SQLite → Neon Postgres to host.
apps.desc: Spreadsheet-style expense tracker split by business entity.

apps.name: GigaHuman
apps.desc: Life-inventory app scoring every area of your life 1–10.

apps.name: Recipe Manager
apps.desc: Save and organize recipes, seeded from a Notion export.

apps.name: Scripture Study
apps.desc: Scripture study + worldbuilder for the Standard Works.

apps.name: Atelier
apps.note: Split client + server + DB to host.
apps.desc: Distraction-free novel-writing app — scenes, chapters, worldbuilding.

apps.name: Gap Bot
apps.note: Research engine — no web UI to host.
apps.desc: Python engine researching the gap-fill options edge on SPY / QQQ.
